title: Quick Big Five Mini
promise: A two-minute Big Five snapshot. 10 IPIP items, five dimensions, no score to maximize — only positions with a use.
description: 10 IPIP Likert items (2 per dimension) across Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, Emotional Stability. Reverse-scored items prevent acquiescence bias. Result shows brief low/moderate/high positions on five dimensions with a clear reliability disclaimer and a link to the deeper 20-item Builder Traits Snapshot.
ogTitle: Quick Big Five Mini — Outfinity Quiz
ogDescription: A two-minute Big Five snapshot. 10 IPIP items. Private by design.
